subcodes.first_line: O Zaynu'l-Muqarrabin! Thy letter hath come before Our presence and We have hearkened unto that which it containeth. Thus did the ocean of bounty surge forth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا زین المقربین قد حضر کتابک لدی الوجه و سمعنا ما فیه بذلک تموج بحر عنایه
subcodes.subjects: @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
